about.title: About us
about.p1: We are a three-partner team from Vilnius, bringing one of Poland's most beloved street food formats to Lithuania – zapiekanki.
about.p2: A zapiekanka is a 30–50 cm open-faced hot sandwich on a crispy baguette, loaded with mushrooms, cheese, meats, vegetables, and sauces. Ready in 3–5 minutes, perfect for eating on the go.
about.p3: Our professional oven ensures ideal crispness and speed, while our Kamado ceramic grill lets us offer unique grilled specials for events.

menu.title: Menu
menu.subtitle: Every zapiekanka baked fresh to order

bbq.name: BBQ
bbq.description: Pulled pork, BBQ sauce, jalapeño, cheese

step2.description: Pick your favorite zapiekanka at the truck window

step3.description: Fresh, hot zapiekanka ready in 3–5 minutes

locations.title: Where to find us
locations.subtitle: Three channels – always where the people are

events.title: Events and festivals
events.description: City celebrations, fairs, concerts, festivals – where the crowds are. We attend 15–20 events during summer season across Lithuania.

offices.title: Business districts
offices.description: Lunchtime (11:00–14:00) we park near Vilnius office complexes. Fast, tasty, and cheaper than a restaurant.

neighborhoods.title: Residential areas
neighborhoods.description: Evenings and weekends we come to Pilaitė, Fabijoniškės, Justiniškės, and Baltupiai. Great food right at your doorstep.

rental.title: Truck rental
rental.description: A fully equipped food truck for your event – weddings, corporate parties, outdoor birthdays. We provide all necessary equipment and gear.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Orders, events, rental – drop us a message
